# Portfolio - Gonzalo Plaza Rueda

> Personal portfolio website of Gonzalo Plaza Rueda, a Software Engineer specialized in frontend development based in Málaga, Spain. Showcasing professional experience, personal projects, and technical skills.

## Main Sections

- [Main Section](/) - Hero section with introduction and animated title
- [Work Experience](/#work-experience) - Professional experience timeline
- [Projects](/#projects) - Personal projects showcase
- [About Me](/#about-me) - Personal background and story

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://gonzaloplazarueda.com
- Language: Spanish (es_ES)
